data.name: My New Roommate Is a Jealous Sadist
data.detailed_description:
Your landlord informs you that a refugee from a war-torn country is looking for an apartment. As an act of kindness, you agree to let her be your first ever roommate after living alone for 3 years. However, it soon becomes apparent that your new roommate is extremely sadistic and deranged. Her jealousy over your life makes her release all of her anger on you in violent, sadistic, and even sexual ways. Your new jealous, sadistic roommate will change the course of your life forever

  • ~5K words

  • Kinetic Novel

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 22 Unique character images

  • 29 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game
data.about_the_game:
Your landlord informs you that a refugee from a war-torn country is looking for an apartment. As an act of kindness, you agree to let her be your first ever roommate after living alone for 3 years. However, it soon becomes apparent that your new roommate is extremely sadistic and deranged. Her jealousy over your life makes her release all of her anger on you in violent, sadistic, and even sexual ways. Your new jealous, sadistic roommate will change the course of your life forever

data.short_description: Your new roommate is from a war-torn country, and it soon becomes apparent that your new roommate is extremely jealous and sadistic. Now you're forced to endure her violent, sadistic, and even sexual plans for you
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
